tasks.subject: Task 1: searchNoteRevisions via filesSearchV2
tasks.description:
**Goal:** dropboxClient.searchNoteRevisions(guid) returns all stored versions {rev,date} (desc) via filesSearchV2; parse/collect split into pure exported helpers.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/sync/dropboxClient.ts; Test app/tests/unit/lib/sync/searchNoteRevisions.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- searchNoteRevisions

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/sync/dropboxClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/lib/sync/searchNoteRevisions.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- searchNoteRevisions", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseNoteRevFromPath parses/rejects", "collectNoteRevisions filters/dedupes/sorts desc", "searchNoteRevisions paginates", "throws unauthenticated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: noteHistory data module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createNoteHistory(guid) fills versions via search (inject current rev; manifest-scan fallback + load-more), lazy body cache, pure label/plaintext helpers.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/desktop/noteHistory.svelte.ts; Test app/tests/unit/lib/desktop/noteHistory.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- noteHistory

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/noteHistory.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/lib/desktop/noteHistory.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- noteHistory", "acceptanceCriteria": ["load desc + inject current rev", "empty search => fallback scan", "fetchBody caches", "noteToPlainText + formatVersionLabel"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: TomboyEditor readOnly prop
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add readOnly?:boolean (default false) → editable:!readOnly + skip autolink scan. Existing callers unchanged.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte; Test app/tests/unit/lib/editor/tomboyEditorReadOnly.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- tomboyEditorReadOnly

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte", "app/tests/unit/lib/editor/tomboyEditorReadOnly.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- tomboyEditorReadOnly", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default editable true", "readOnly=>contenteditable false", "autolink skipped", "no regression"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: session kind 'history' + openHistory + persist exclude
tasks.description:

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts; Test app/tests/unit/lib/desktop/openHistory.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/lib/desktop/openHistory.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- openHistory", "acceptanceCriteria": ["beside source same size clamped x", "no-op absent source", "singleton focus", "persist excludes history"]}
```
